name: Umhlanga (Reed Dance)
traditions: Gathering reeds for the Queen Mother; ceremonial reed dance in traditional attire; singing; royal ceremony at Ludzidzini Royal Village.
historicalBackground: Umhlanga dates to the 1940s, adapting an older Swazi ceremony. Tens of thousands of unmarried women participate in this celebration of chastity and solidarity.
description: Eswatini's grand reed dance ceremony, where tens of thousands of maidens perform in a spectacular display of cultural pride.
